Name: FTextBlockStyle
Description: Represents the appearance of an STextBlock

Variables.Name: Font
Variables.Description: Font family and size to be used when displaying this text.

Variables.Name: ColorAndOpacity
Variables.Description: The color and opacity of this text

Variables.Name: ShadowOffset
Variables.Description: How much should the shadow be offset? An offset of 0 implies no shadow.

Variables.Name: ShadowColorAndOpacity
Variables.Description: The color and opacity of the shadow

Variables.Name: SelectedBackgroundColor
Variables.Description: The background color of selected text

Variables.Name: UnderlineBrush
Variables.Description: The brush used to draw an underline under the text (if any)
